raw_consumer_statement:
Provide a description of the incident and how you were victimized.Provide information not captured elsewhere in this complaint form. 
On XX/XX/2023 the following charges were posted to my American Express Corporate Card account : XXXX XXXXXXXX : $ XXXX XXXX XXXX {$120000.00} XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX $ XXXX XXXX : XXXX XXXX XXXX : $ XXXX XXXX : $ XXXX XXXX : $ XXXX XXXX XXXX $ XXXX XXXX : XXXX XXXX XXXX : $ XXXX XXXX : $ XXXX XXXX : $ XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXThese are fraudulent charges that I recognized the morning of XX/XX/2023. On XX/XX/2023 I contacted the American Express fraud department and explained the situation that my card was compromised and that these charges were not initiated by me. After validating my account information American Express closed my account and issued me a new card.On XX/XX/2023 American Express credited my account {$31000.00}, which is the sum total of the above charges.On XX/XX/2023 American Express reversed the credit and assessed my account {>= $1,000,000}, making me personally responsible for charges I did not initiate or authorize.On XX/XX/2023 I contacted American Express and told them that I was filing an internet crime report and affidavit.
